## 📋 Title
[Judul task yang jelas]

## 📝 Description
[Deskripsi detail apa yang harus dikerjakan]

## 🔴 Problem
[Apa masalahnya? Mengapa task ini penting?]

## ✅ Expected Result
[Apa hasil yang diharapkan?]

## ✔️ Acceptance Criteria
Pastikan semua selesai sebelum mark as DONE:
- [ ] Requirement 1
- [ ] Requirement 2
- [ ] Requirement 3
- [ ] Code tested
- [ ] No errors in console
- [ ] Documentation written

## 📚 Resources
- [Link 1]
- [Link 2]
- [PRD-Backend.md](../../PRD-Backend.md) untuk requirements lengkap

## 🏷️ Labels
- Type: setup / feature / fix / refactor / docs
- Phase: phase-1 / phase-2 / phase-3 / etc
- Priority: high / medium / low
- Complexity: easy / medium / hard

## ⏱️ Effort Estimate
[e.g., 2-3 hours]

## 📌 Notes
[Additional notes atau context]

---

## 🔄 Workflow

1. **Assigned developer** → Mulai mengerjakan
2. **Create feature branch** → `git checkout -b feature/task-name`
3. **Update issue** → Add comment untuk progress
4. **After completion** → Create PR reference issue ini
5. **After merge** → Issue auto-close atau manual close dengan PR

---

## 💬 Discussion
[Comments akan muncul di sini untuk discussion/feedback]
